design_philosophy: Sophisticated Clarity. A highly secure, premium executive club. Absolute dark mode with minimal distractions. Deep blacks, structured gray borders, sharp amber actions, and subtle green verifications. Avoid bouncy animations and gradients; everything must feel grounded, precise, and expensive.

fonts.heading: 'Cabinet Grotesk', 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', sans-serif
fonts.body: 'IBM Plex Sans', 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', sans-serif

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-20 md:w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-[#262626] bg-[#0A0A0A]

surface.card: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#262626] rounded-sm transition-colors duration-200

button.primary: bg-[#F5A623] text-black font-semibold rounded-sm px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#D97706] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#404040] text-primary rounded-sm px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:border-[#F5A623] transition-colors
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-secondary hover:text-primary hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors
button.icon: p-2 rounded-sm text-secondary hover:text-primary hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors

input.field: w-full bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#262626] text-primary rounded-sm px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#F5A623] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F5A623] transition-all placeholder:text-[#4B5563]
input.label: text-xs font-medium text-secondary

badge.verified: inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm bg-[#10B981]/10 border border-[#10B981]/20 text-[#10B981] text-xs font-medium
badge.status_online: w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#10B981] ring-2 ring-[#000000]
badge.category: px-2 py-1 bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#262626] rounded-sm text-xs text-primary

chat.sidebar: w-80 border-r border-[#262626] flex flex-col bg-[#0A0A0A]
chat.bubble_received: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-primary rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[70%]
chat.bubble_sent: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] text-primary rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[70%]

email.message_item: p-4 border-b border-[#262626] cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors

rtl_support.directive: Use <html dir='rtl'> when Arabic is selected.
rtl_support.tailwind_classes: Use Tailwind's logical properties (e.g., ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, border-s, border-e) instead of physical properties (ml-, mr-, pl-, pr-, border-l, border-r) to ensure automatic flipping in RTL mode.
rtl_support.fonts: Automatically switch heading and body font family to 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic' when dir='rtl'.

images.description: Dark, moody corporate architecture. To be used on the right side of the split-screen auth layout. Apply a linear gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/40 to-transparent) so text/logos can sit cleanly on top.

testing.requirement: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

libraries.components: shadcn/ui (heavily customized: remove rounded corners, use flat dark colors, no shadows)
libraries.i18n: i18next or react-i18next for EN/AR toggling

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default Tailwind grays; use the hex values provided to maintain the pure black/dark amber luxury aesthetic.
Build the Auth page as a split-screen. Left: Multi-step registration form or login. Right: Hero image provided in media.images.
Ensure the Chat UI feels like WhatsApp but looks corporate. Use the dark bubble colors provided, avoid bright blue/green bubbles.
The Email UI should mimic a professional desktop client (like Outlook or Superhuman) with a 3-pane layout (Folders -> List -> Reading Pane).
Implement RTL natively using Tailwind's logical properties (e.g., `ps-4` instead of `pl-4`). Do not duplicate layouts for RTL.
Always apply `data-testid` to buttons, inputs, and major containers.
